arctic_bear.name: Arctic Bear
arctic_bear.description: Master of arctic and winter warfare. Strong bonuses in cold and snowy conditions.

sea_wolf.name: Sea Wolf
sea_wolf.description: Exceptional naval commander. Excels at convoy raiding, submarine warfare, and fleet actions.

desert_fox.name: Desert Fox
desert_fox.description: Master of desert warfare and rapid mobile operations.

jungle_panther.name: Jungle Panther
jungle_panther.description: Expert in jungle and dense forest fighting.

mountain_specialist.name: Mountain Specialist
mountain_specialist.description: Highly effective when fighting in mountainous terrain.

logistics_wizard.name: Logistics Wizard
logistics_wizard.description: Significantly improves supply efficiency and reduces attrition for their command.

aggressive.name: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Favors bold offensive action. Bonus to attack but may take more risks.

cautious.name: Cautious
cautious.description: Careful planner. Improves defensive performance and organization.

reckless.name: Reckless
reckless.description: Takes unnecessary risks. Can increase casualties.
